backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining case management system with types (Case, Activity, Document), persistent state maps, authorization/storage mixins, and public functions for CRUD operations on cases, activities, and documents with permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of CommentHistorySection component from CaseDetail page, listing affected files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing component purposes, UI layouts, styling, and functionality across the React application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, muted, destructive, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with routes for TaskQueue and CaseDetail, handling authentication state via Internet Identity, and displaying loading/login prompts.
Activity form component with action/outcome dropdowns, comments textarea, and add button that submits activities to backend via mutation hook and toggles history timeline display.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Timeline component fetching and displaying case activities from backend in reverse chronological order with timestamps, action/outcome badges, payment details, and comments.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Compact case card component displaying debtor info, status badge, customer ID with copy button, phone number, and color-coded DPD badge that navigates to case detail on click.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Displays a timeline of comments for a case with colored backgrounds, timestamps, and a scrollable container. Shows a placeholder message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a checkmark confirmation for 2 seconds after successful copy.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of case documents with file type icons, upload dates, and preview buttons. Includes Upload and Scan action buttons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with Kollect Lite branding, logo, and logout button that clears authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header, content outlet, and footer containing copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Login screen component displaying Kollect Lite branding and a login button using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: iPhone frame mockup component with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI preview.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Badge component that displays case status (ESCALATED, ACTIVE, PTP) with color-coded styling based on CaseStatus enum.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines Comment interface and exports dummy comment data for multiple cases with timestamps, agent names, and comment text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data, activities, and documents from the backend actor with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including Kollect Lite brand colors (teal-dark, gray-bg) and design tokens for UI components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component displaying debtor information, status, contact actions, and sections for activities and documents with dummy case data lookup.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page displaying a searchable, filterable list of collection cases with dummy data for 20 cases and a phone mockup component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, container settings, border radius, shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request to remove the CommentHistorySection component from above the DocumentsSection in the CaseDetail page.
